title: Analytics - Firmware Update Failed
scenario: Verify that after a failed DFU (firmware update), the Firebase page displays all default elements plus DFU-specific fields and the event counts for related elements increase after a few hours.
steps: Open the Firebase page for the app.
Verify that default elements are displayed: graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, app environment.
Verify that additional DFU-specific elements are displayed: Device PID, Charge Unit PID, Update Type, Error Description.
Initiate a DFU (firmware update) on any device and ensure it fails.
Wait a few hours for event counts to update.
Check the Firebase page and verify that the event count for related elements (Device PID, Charge Unit PID, Update Type, Error Description) has increased.
expected: After a failed DFU, the Firebase page displays default elements plus Device PID, Charge Unit PID, Update Type, and Error Description. After a few hours, the event counts for these DFU-related elements increase.
